mapper.select: SELECT id, name, capacity, CAST(map_points AS CHAR) AS map_points, enabled, created_at, updated_at FROM road_segments ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT id, name, capacity, CAST(map_points AS CHAR) AS map_points, enabled, created_at, updated_at FROM road_segments WHERE enabled = 1 ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO road_segments (name, capacity, map_points, enabled, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{capacity}, #{mapPoints}, #{enabled}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE road_segments SET name = #{name}, capacity = #{capacity}, map_points = #{mapPoints}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
